headline: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Sells SmartDose Rights To AbbVie To Refocus Its Business
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE:WST) has sold the rights and facilities related to its SmartDose 3.5 mL On Body Delivery System to AbbVie. The transaction shifts ownership of this specific large volume wearable injector platform while allowing West Pharmaceutical Services to focus on other drug delivery offerings. The deal reflects a change in how NYSE:WST is positioning its portfolio within the drug delivery and pharmaceutical packaging market. West Pharmaceutical Services operates in...

headline: Resmed Divests MatrixCare Business to Sharpen Focus on Connected Care
summary: RMD's MatrixCare sale sharpens its focus on sleep, breathing and connected care while freeing resources for AI-powered digital health.

headline: NTRA's Signatera Gains EU IVDR Certification for Multiple Cancers
summary: Natera's Signatera became the first personalized MRD test for solid tumors to earn EU IVDR certification, supporting broader expansion across Europe.
